criteria.imaging: UCSF-ALPTDG local NIfTI: baseline + followup visit folders with expert segmentation masks (*_time1_seg.nii.gz, *_time2_seg.nii.gz)
criteria.same_id_genomics_idh_grade: Same UCSF subjectid with IDH + grade in data/processed/ucsf_longitudinal_master.csv (UCSF clinical workbook; not TCGA expression data)

notes: cohort.json is curated for demo pairs/backups, not a full inventory. Regenerate this file after downloading UCSF NIfTI or refreshing clean_ucsf.py output.
